query: SELECT inferred_sector, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(AVG(hybrid_score), 2) as avg_score, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT priority_tier) as tiers FROM carver_risk_cards GROUP BY inferred_sector ORDER BY cnt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT inferred_sector, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(AVG(hybrid_score), 2) as avg_score, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT priority_tier) as tiers FROM carver_risk_cards GROUP BY inferred_sector ORDER BY cnt DESC
